title: Multiscale Cell-Cell Interactive Spatial Transcriptomics Analysis.
author: Cottrell S Wei GW
content: S-EPMC12667549 PMC12667549 Multiscale Cell-Cell Interactive Spatial Transcriptomics Analysis. Spatial transcriptomics data analysis integrates gene expression profiles with their corresponding spatial locations to identify spatial domains, infer cell-type dynamics, and detect gene expression
